zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Berkeley於大約1265年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，她的父親Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley21歲，母親Joan de Ferrers19歲。她與Ralph de Stourton結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1290年在英國維爾爾斯圖頓享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Berkeley于大约1265年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，她的父亲Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley21岁，母亲Joan de Ferrers19岁。她与Ralph de Stourton结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1290年在英国維爾爾斯圖頓享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Berkeley was born about 1265, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, was 21 and her mother, Joan de Ferrers, was 19. She married Ralph de Stourton. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1290, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Berkeley est née environ 1265, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ferrers, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Stourton. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1290, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Berkeley um 1265 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley 21 und ihre Mutter Joan de Ferrers 19. Sie hat Ralph de Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1290 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Stourton, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Berkeley è nata il circa 1265 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Joan de Ferrers, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Stourton. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1290, nel Stourton, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Berkeleyが約1265年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeleyは21歳，母Joan de Ferrersは19歳であった。Ralph de Stourtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1290年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Berkeley(이)가 대략 1265년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Ferrers(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Ralph de Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ferrers, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Stourton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1290, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Berkeley родилась около 1265 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ferrers, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Stourton. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1290 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Berkeley nació aproximadamente 1265, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joan de Ferrers, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ralph de Stourton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1290, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
